subject: english
title: Tiếng Anh Cầu Giấy 2025 (đề chính thức)
intro: Đề thi chính thức tuyển sinh vào lớp 6 — môn Tiếng Anh, THCS Cầu Giấy 2025. 30 câu trắc nghiệm kèm đáp án.
source: tak12.com — Đề chính thức Cầu Giấy 2025 (kèm đáp án + giải thích)

questions.stem: Choose the word which has the underlined part pronounced differently from the others.
Choose the word which has the underlined part pronounced differently from the others.
Choose the word that differs from the rest in the position of the main stress.
Choose the word that differs from the rest in the position of the main stress.
Tim and Peter _____ STEAM lessons on Wednesdays.
Would you like _____ sand castles with me?
She gave him a _____ of chocolate as a birthday gift.

Jane: _____ you wear uniform to school every day?
Harry: No, we needn't.
Ann was absent from class yesterday because she _____ sick.

Fill in the blank with ONE word:
Mount Everest is the highest mountain _____ the world.
Lucy doesn't often want much sugar in her coffee, just _____.

A: Do you collect stamps or other things?
B: Yes, I'm a stamp _____.
If you don't know what a word means, try to guess the meaning, or _____ the word in the dictionary.

A: Where do you usually meet your friends?
B: We often spend the whole day in the _____, but we don't buy anything.

Choose the underlined part that needs correction:
"They often go to bed early and never get up lately."

Choose the underlined part that needs correction:
"Do you know how many womens there are in the living room?"

Choose the word CLOSEST in meaning to the underlined word:
"I think we shouldn't throw trash into the river."

Choose the word CLOSEST in meaning to the underlined word:
"Finally, we all agreed to go camping in the countryside."

Choose the word OPPOSITE in meaning to the underlined word:
"Felix usually gets bad marks because he's very lazy."

Choose the word(s) OPPOSITE in meaning to the underlined word(s):
"Turn off the tap when we brush our teeth and wash the dishes to save water."

James: What is your younger brother like?
Don: _____.

options.text: He'd like a cup of coffee
He has blonde hair and blue eyes

questions.stem:
Betty: I think we should use less paper in order to save trees in the forest.
Jerry: _____.

options.text: It's nice of you to say so

questions.stem: Rearrange the words to make a correct sentence: take / the kids / They / cinema / the / next / to / Sunday / will /.

options.text: They will to take the kids next Sunday the cinema.
They will take the kids to the cinema next Sunday.
They will take next Sunday the kids to the cinema.
They will take the kids next Sunday to the cinema.

questions.stem: Rearrange the words to make a correct sentence: He / a / saw / in / big / car / black / the / beautiful / street / last week /.

options.text: He saw a black beautiful big street in the car last week.
He saw a big black beautiful car in the street last week.
He saw a beautiful big black car in the street last week.
He saw a black beautiful big car in the street last week.

questions.stem:
Choose the sentence CLOSEST in meaning to:
"The woman couldn't buy this flat because she was very poor."

options.text: Because the woman couldn't buy this flat, she was very poor.
The woman couldn't buy this flat, so she was very poor.
The woman was very poor, so she couldn't buy this flat.
The woman was very poor because she couldn't buy this flat.

questions.stem:
Choose the sentence CLOSEST in meaning to:
"Let's decorate our house before Tet."

options.text: Why don't we decorate our house before Tet?
We must decorate our house before Tet.
Shall I decorate your house after Tet?
Let's clean the house before Tet.

questions.stem:
Choose the sentence CLOSEST in meaning to:
"The anime film was so boring that I fell asleep."

options.text: The anime film was too boring to keep me awake.
The anime film was such boring that I fell asleep.
The anime film was very boring so I fall asleep.
The anime film was boring enough to keep me watching.

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence made from the cues: Not / I / forget / clean / table / after / lunch time.

options.text: I must not forget to clean the table after lunch time.
Not I forget must to clean table the after lunch time.
I don't forget must clean the table after lunch time.
Forget not I must clean the table after lunch time.

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence made from the cues: I / when / I / a child / often / make / paper planes / my sister.

options.text: When I was a child, I often made paper planes with my sister.
I often make paper planes with my sister when I a child.
When I was child, I often makes paper planes with my sister.
When I am a child, I often made paper planes my sister with.

questions.stem: Choose the best sentence made from the cues: Recycle / effective / solution / help / protect / environment!

options.text: Recycling is an effective solution to help protect the environment!
Recycle is a effective solution help to protecting the environment!
Recycling an effective solution is to help protect the environment!
Recycle are effective solution to helps protecting the environment!
